<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Přihlášení partnera"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/authentication/v1/partner"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Partner se ověří a získá přístupový token.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json; charset=utf-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"username":{"type":"string","description":"Uživatelské jméno partnera"},"password":{"type":"string","description":"Tajné heslo partnera"}},"required":["username","password"],"example":{"username":"eShop","password":"eShopSecretPassword"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Vydán přístupový token partnera","headers":{},"content":{"application/json; charset=utf-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"accessToken":{"type":"string","description":"Přístupový token"},"expiresIn":{"type":"number","description":"Zbývající doba platnosti tokenu (v sekundách)"},"tokentype":{"type":"string","description":"typ tokenu. Vždy \"držitel“."}},"required":["accessToken","tokentype"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"accessToken":"TokenForPartnerTokenForPartnerTokenForPartnerTokenForPartner","expiresIn":7200,"tokentype":"bearer"}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Nelze ověřit partnera","headers":{},"content":{"application/json; charset=utf-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Jedinečný interní kód chyby"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Popis chyby srozumitelný pro člověka (nelokalizovaný)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","description":"JSON cesta atributu požadavku, který způsobil chybu (pokud je to relevantní)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","description":"Interní ID tiketu, používané pro zpětné sledování chyb"}},"required":["code","message","severity"]},"description":"Pole s chybami"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
